title: Insolvency practitioner sanctions: Matthew Fox 5 September 2024
body: "Summary of complaints: Having become aware of significant late/outstanding statutory filing, and following a subsequent risk visit to Mr Fox at short notice, the ILC had concerns re extensive filing issues.  It was noted that Mr Fox was extremely slow at responding the ILC’s queries during the visit and that these, as well as the other issues (including concerns about the accuracy of cashbooks and the receipts and payments accounts provided to them) demonstrate extensive and systemic filing issues. "
